attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who targets early KOM points rather than sustained climbing efforts. Attacks on shorter climbs or intermediate sprints within breakaways, not final climbs.
team_tactics: Minimal team support evident; operates independently in breakaways to contest mountain points classification rather than stage wins.
terrain_preference: Shorter, punchy climbs and KOM sprints within breakaways suit best. Long, sustained high-power climbs expose limitations against pure climbers and time trialists.
vulnerability: Sustained power efforts on long climbs where pure climbers and even time trial specialists can drop him. Struggles to defend position actively when attacked.
key_patterns: Targets mountains jersey through breakaway placement rather than climbing dominance (2 observations)
Dropped on sustained climbs by both pure climbers and TT specialists (2 observations)
Defends classifications passively rather than through aggressive counterattacks (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Maintained breakaway presence and fought for KOM jersey, but clear physical limitations prevented active defense
